title: pavonia triloba
intro: Pavonia triloba, also known as rose mallow or rock rose, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family and native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia triloba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Pavonia triloba include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
